title: alyssum litorale f. molliusculum
intro: Alyssum litorale f. molliusculum, also known as sea alyssum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of sea alyssum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate digestive issues.
